message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>Serological tests for SARS-CoV-2 coronavirus in pre-COVID-19 samples in Japan showed 1.5%–1.75% positives, and previous surveys might overestimate COVID-19 seroprevalence in several population of Japan. These false negatives could be excluded by combination of different diagnostics to 0.25%.</jats:p>
title: Serological Tests for SARS-CoV-2 Coronavirus by Commercially Available Point-of-Care and Laboratory Diagnostics in Pre-COVID-19 Samples in Japan
